patterns_discovered: DE: 214/257 flags are shared VG/Amt domains — multiple small municipalities under one Verwaltungsgemeinschaft domain. Completely legitimate.
DE: 14 entries with commercial TLDs (.net, .org, .info) are all legitimate VG websites (vorharz.net, dahner-felsenland.net, stadt-geisa.org, gemeinde-hoeckendorf.info)
AT: 88/93 flags are government subdomains (.gv.at, .ktn.gde.at, .bgld.gv.at, .steiermark.at) where seed had plain .at domain without MX and pipeline found correct government domain
AT: gemeinde-hart.com (.com TLD) confirmed as official Hart im Zillertal website
LI: Zero flags — 11 municipalities all clean
LU: 3 flags at threshold 20 (vdl.lu=Luxembourg, aerenzdall.lu, g-w.lu) — all abbreviations, below threshold 40
heuristic_tuning_notes: Austrian .gv.at/.ktn.gde.at/.bgld.gv.at subdomains should be recognized as legitimate government patterns — currently flagged due to low name similarity with subdomain prefix
German VG/Amt shared domains should be expected pattern — consider adding VG/Amt keyword detection to reduce false positives
Threshold 40 is appropriate for DACH — reduces DE from 2938 to 257 flags while catching truly suspicious entries
